item.title: LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure
item.description: You’ve got LEGO 31109 Creator 3in1 Pirate Ship Toy with Inn & Skull Island Gift for Kids Boys & Girls age 9 Plus Years Old with Minifigures and Shark Figure at the following link: ℹ️: The pirate ship toy features an opening roof and wall to access the cabin, a foretop to keep watch for targets and rotating cannons for more fun Includes 2 pirate minifigures in full costume with sabres, 1 deckhand sailor plus buildable shark and bird figures and a skeleton figure On the spooky island, a handle allows kids to open and close the skull, or they can hide the gold in the Pirate Inn’s secret hidey-hole This LEGO Creator 3in1 set, featuring a pirate ship toy, makes a great birthday gift for a son or daughter, or Christmas present for swashbuckling kids, boys and girls aged 9+ years old This LEGO Creator set for aspiring pirates features 3 models in 1: a classic Pirate Ship toy, rustic Pirates’ Inn and mysterious Skull Island Accessories include a map, torch, pistol, treasure chest, telescope, goblets, 2 sabres and many more details, like flags, barrels and lanterns 🛒 Check the deal!
